overview: StudentHub is a clean, professional student tool platform with a GPA calculator, percentage calculator, dark/light mode, admin dashboard, and AdSense-ready monetization sections. Built with a mobile-first, Apple/Notion-inspired design.
features: GPA Calculator with multi-subject input and real-time results
Percentage Calculator with instant letter grade display
Dark mode and light mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Admin dashboard for tool management, announcements, and ad controls
AdSense-ready header, sidebar, and between-card ad placements
PWA support — installable on mobile devices
Optional Internet Identity login with full guest access
Dashboard homepage with tool cards and usage stats
